case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OFSAN FRANCISCO VS. NANCY E SHOR

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAY-02-2003 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ENTERED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
